  • Class
    Description
    BlockTridiagonalMatrix
    Block-tridiagonal matrix storage for staged distillation linear systems.
    ColumnMeshEquationType
    Equation groups used in the distillation column MESH residual vector.
    ColumnMeshResidual
    Immutable residual vector for distillation column MESH diagnostics.
    ColumnMeshResidualEvaluator
    Evaluates scaled MESH residuals for a distillation column state.
    ColumnMeshResidualEvaluator.ResidualBuilder
    Builder for residual vectors and metadata.
    ColumnMeshState
    Snapshot of tray variables used by distillation MESH residual diagnostics.
    ColumnSolver
    Internal strategy interface for distillation column solvers.
    ColumnSolveResult
    Immutable summary of a distillation column solve.
    ColumnSolverFactory
    Factory for the built-in distillation column solver strategies.
    ColumnSolverFactory.AutoSolver
    Automatic solver selector.
    ColumnSolverFactory.DampedSubstitutionSolver
    Damped substitution adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.DirectSubstitutionSolver
    Direct substitution adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.InsideOutSolver
    Inside-out adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.MatrixInsideOutSolver
    Matrix inside-out adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.MeshResidualSolver
    MESH residual-monitored adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.NaphtaliSandholmColumnSolver
    Naphtali-Sandholm simultaneous MESH adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.SumRatesSolver
    Sum-rates adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.TemperatureNewtonSolver
    Temperature-Newton adapter.
    ColumnSolverFactory.WegsteinSolver
    Wegstein adapter.
    ColumnSpecification
    Represents a column specification (degree of freedom) for a distillation column.
    ColumnSpecification.ProductLocation
    Indicates which end of the column this specification refers to.
    ColumnSpecification.SpecificationType
    Types of column specifications.
    Condenser
    Condenser class.
    DistillationColumn
    Models a tray based distillation column with optional condenser and reboiler.
    DistillationColumn.Builder
    Fluent builder for DistillationColumn.
    DistillationColumn.ColumnOptimizationState
    Snapshot of column settings reused when rebuilding candidates during tray optimization.
    DistillationColumn.ColumnPumparound
    Liquid pumparound circuit that withdraws liquid from one tray, changes temperature, and returns it to another tray.
    DistillationColumn.ColumnSideDrawSpecification
    Flow specification for a side-product draw.
    DistillationColumn.CondenserMode
    Operating mode for the condenser tray.
    DistillationColumn.DynamicColumnModel
    Dynamic column model formulation.
    DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationMetrics
    Economic metrics calculated for one distillation-column candidate.
    DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult
    Result from an economic tray-count, feed-tray, and optional reflux/boilup search.
    DistillationColumn.ReboilerMode
    Operating mode for the reboiler tray.
    DistillationColumn.ShortcutInitializationResult
    Result from initializing a rigorous column with shortcut FUG design estimates.
    DistillationColumn.SideDrawPhase
    Phase withdrawn by a column side draw.
    DistillationColumn.SimplifiedKvalueModel
    Simplified K-value model for the inside-out inner loop.
    DistillationColumn.SolverType
    Available solving strategies for the column.
    DistillationColumn.SolveStatus
    Status of the latest column solve.
    DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult
    Result from a rigorous tray-count and feed-tray search.
    DistillationColumnMatrixSolver
    Matrix inside-out warm-start solver for distillation columns.
    DistillationInterface
    DistillationInterface interface.
    NaphtaliSandholmSolver
    Naphtali-Sandholm simultaneous correction solver for distillation columns.
    PackedColumn
    Packed column (contactor/absorber/stripper) using packing internals with HETP-based staging.
    RateBasedPackedColumn
    Counter-current rate-based packed column for non-reactive absorption and stripping.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.ColumnReport
    JSON report DTO.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.ColumnResidualEvaluation
    Internal residual evaluation container for the equation-oriented column solver.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.ColumnSolver
    Column-level profile solver options.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.ColumnState
    Internal column state reconstructed from equation-oriented unknowns.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.CounterCurrentSolution
    Internal counter-current solution container.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.FilmModel
    Film-model options for component transfer across the gas-liquid interface.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.HeatTransferModel
    Heat-transfer options for gas-liquid heat exchange in the packed section.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.InterfaceEquilibrium
    Interface equilibrium data for one segment.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.MassTransferCorrelation
    Mass-transfer correlation options for the packed-column film coefficients.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.SegmentComputation
    Internal segment computation container.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.SegmentResidualEvaluation
    Internal residual evaluation container for the simultaneous segment solver.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.SegmentResult
    Segment result data for a rate-based packed column.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.SegmentSolver
    Segment-level coupling options.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.SparseJacobian
    Internal sparse Jacobian assembled by the equation-oriented column solver.
    RateBasedPackedColumn.TransportSnapshot
    Internal transport-property snapshot.
    ReactiveTray
    A distillation tray that performs reactive equilibrium (simultaneous chemical equilibrium + phase equilibrium) instead of standard VLE.
    Reboiler
    Reboiler class.
    ScrubColumn
    LNG scrub column model for heavy hydrocarbon removal prior to liquefaction.
    ShortcutDistillationColumn
    Short-cut distillation column using the Fenske-Underwood-Gilliland (FUG) method.
    SimpleTray
    SimpleTray class.
    TrayInterface
    TrayInterface interface.
